name: Communication with a web site known to be a phishing or fraud site
notes: This rule triggers when a communication with a web site known to be a phishing or fraud site has been observed.
conditions_text: when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
when the flow matches Application is any of [Web.Malware(fraud) or Web.Malware(phish)]
TD_list: APPLY Communication with a web site known to be a phishing or fraud site on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
AND when the flow matches Application is any of [Web.Malware(fraud) or Web.Malware(phish)]
RED_list: Event name: Communication with a web site known to be a phishing or fraud site

Event description: Communication with a web site known to be associated with the phishing or fraud.  A simple communication with these sites does not mean anything bad has happened however you may wish to investigate the payload of the queries and responses made.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
